<u_active>true</u_active> <u_banner_list_page_id/> <u_banner_list_view_name/> <u_direction>desc</u_direction> <u_discover_controller_url>false</u_discover_controller_url> <u_field_list>taskernumber, short_description,assigned_to,state,primary_assignee,originator,u_reviewer,suspense_date</u_field_list> <u_filter>stateNOT IN-6,-5,-3^active=true^primary_assigneeNOT IN OUsWhereIamAMember^tasking_authorityDYNAMIC466104e81bd34190848aa931604bcbe0^ORprimary_officeDYNAMIC466104e81bd34190848aa931604bcbe0</u_filter> <u_filter_label>Active Tasks by my OU to others</u_filter_label> <u_filter_menu_header>MY OU's ACTIVE TASKS</u_filter_menu_header> <u_filter_page>my_ous_tasks_home_page</u_filter_page> <u_hover_field/> <u_include_comments>true</u_include_comments> <u_modal_title_field_separator>: </u_modal_title_field_separator> <u_modal_title_fields/> <u_order/> <u_order_by>taskernumber</u_order_by>
